result.stdout:
Paket version 10.0.0+1f2a572bc11d1d88c5c6f05e9e39e29e570a02b6
Help was requested:
USAGE: paket [--help] [--version] [--silent] [--verbose] [--log-file <path>]
             [<subcommand> [<options>]]

SUBCOMMANDS:

    add <options>         add a new dependency
    github <options>      commands to manipulate GitHub repository references
    git <options>         commands to manipulate git repository references
    clear-cache <options> clear the global and optionally local NuGet and cache
                          directories
    config <options>      store global configuration values like NuGet
                          credentials
    convert-from-nuget <options>
                          convert projects from NuGet to Paket
    find-refs <options>   find all project files that have a dependency
                          installed
    init <options>        create an empty paket.dependencies file in the
                          current working directory
    auto-restore <options>
                          manage automatic package restore during the build
                          process inside Visual Studio
    install <options>     compute dependency graph, download dependencies and
                          update projects
    outdated <options>    find dependencies that have newer versions available
    remove <options>      remove a dependency
    restore <options>     download the computed dependency graph
    simplify <options>    simplify declared dependencies by removing transitive
                          dependencies
    update <options>      update dependencies to their latest version
    find-packages <options>
                          search for NuGet packages
    find-package-versions <options>
                          search for dependency versions
    fix-nuspecs <options> patch a list of .nuspec files to correct transitive
                          dependencies
    generate-nuspec <options>
                          generate a default nuspec for a project including its
                          direct dependencies
    show-installed-packages <options>
                          show installed top-level packages
    show-groups <options> show groups
    pack <options>        create NuGet packages from paket.template files
    push <options>        push a NuGet package
    generate-load-scripts <options>
                          generate F# and C# include scripts that reference
                          installed packages in a interactive environment like
                          F# Interactive or ScriptCS
    why <options>         determine why a dependency is required
    restriction <options> resolve a framework restriction and show details
    info <options>        info

    Use 'paket <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

OPTIONS:

    --version             show Paket version
    --silent, -s          suppress console output
    --verbose, -v         print detailed information to the console
    --log-file <path>     print output to a file
    --help                display this list of options.

Paket version 10.0.0+1f2a572bc11d1d88c5c6f05e9e39e29e570a02b6
Help was requested:
USAGE: paket add [--help] [--version <version constraint>] [--project <path>]
                 [--group <name>] [--create-new-binding-files] [--force]
                 [--interactive] [--redirects] [--clean-redirects]
                 [--no-install] [--no-resolve] [--keep-major] [--keep-minor]
                 [--keep-patch] [--touch-affected-refs] [--type <packageType>]
                 <package ID>

NUGET:

    <package ID>          NuGet package ID

OPTIONS:

    --version, -V <version constraint>
                          dependency version constraint
    --project, -p <path>  add the dependency to a single project only
    --group, -g <name>    add the dependency to a group (default: Main group)
    --create-new-binding-files
                          create binding redirect files if needed
    --force, -f           force download and reinstallation of all dependencies
    --interactive, -i     ask for every project whether to add the dependency
    --redirects           create binding redirects
    --clean-redirects     remove binding redirects that were not created by
                          Paket
    --no-install          do not modify projects
    --no-resolve          do not resolve
    --keep-major          only allow updates that preserve the major version
    --keep-minor          only allow updates that preserve the minor version
    --keep-patch          only allow updates that preserve the patch version
    --touch-affected-refs touch project files referencing affected dependencies
                          to help incremental build tools detecting the change
    --type, -t <packageType>
                          the type of dependency: nuget|clitool (default: nuget)
    --silent, -s          suppress console output
    --verbose, -v         print detailed information to the console
    --log-file <path>     print output to a file
    --help                display this list of options.

                  [--release-notes <text>] [--lock-dependencies]
                  [--minimum-from-lock-file] [--pin-project-references]
                  [--interproject-references <min|fix|keep-major|keep-minor|keep-patch>]
                  [--symbols] [--include-referenced-projects]
                  [--project-url <URL>] [--release-notes-file <path>] <path>

OUTPUT:

    <path>                output directory for .nupkg files

OPTIONS:

    --build-config <configuration>
                          build configuration that should be packaged (default:
                          Release)
    --build-platform <platform>
                          build platform that should be packaged (default:
                          check all known platform targets)
    --version <version>   version of the package
    --template <path>     pack a single paket.template file
    --exclude <package ID>
                          exclude paket.template file by package ID; may be
                          repeated
    --specific-version <package ID> <version>
                          version number to use for package ID; may be repeated
    --release-notes <text>
                          release notes
    --lock-dependencies   use version constraints from paket.lock instead of
                          paket.dependencies
    --minimum-from-lock-file
                          use version constraints from paket.lock instead of
                          paket.dependencies and add them as a minimum version;
                          --lock-dependencies overrides this option
    --pin-project-references
                          pin dependencies generated from project references to
                          exact versions (=) instead of using minimum versions
                          (>=); with --lock-dependencies project references
                          will be pinned even if this option is not specified
    --interproject-references <min|fix|keep-major|keep-minor|keep-patch>
                          set constraints for referenced project versions
    --symbols             create symbol and source packages in addition to
                          library and content packages
    --include-referenced-projects
                          include symbols and source from referenced projects
    --project-url <URL>   homepage URL for the package
    --release-notes-file <path>
                          path to release notes file
    --silent, -s          suppress console output
    --verbose, -v         print detailed information to the console
    --log-file <path>     print output to a file
    --help                display this list of options.
